section_title: Power to fill vacancy in the office of liquidator.--(1) If a vacancy occurs by death, resignation or otherwise in the
content:
293. Power to fill vacancy in the office of liquidator.--(1) If a vacancy occurs by death, resignation or otherwise in the
office of liquidator appointed by the company, the company in general meeting may, subject to any agreement with its
creditors, fill vacancy.
(2) For the purpose of filling in the said vacancy, a general meeting may be convented by any contributory or, if there were
more liquidators than one, by the continuing liquidator.
(3) The meeting shall be held in the manner provided by this Act or by articles, or in such manner as may, on application by
any contributory or by the continuing liquidators, be determined by the Court.

sub_sections.text:
If a vacancy occurs by death, resignation or otherwise in the
office of liquidator appointed by the company, the company in general meeting may, subject to any agreement with its
creditors, fill vacancy.

For the purpose of filling in the said vacancy, a general meeting may be convented by any contributory or, if there were
more liquidators than one, by the continuing liquidator.

The meeting shall be held in the manner provided by this Act or by articles, or in such manner as may, on application by
any contributory or by the continuing liquidators, be determined by the Court.
